title: Iterative, multimodal, and scalable single-cell profiling for discovery and characterization of  signaling regulators
author: Blair, John
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Pilot.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), OligoHash (HTO), Guides (GDO), and Gene-level guides (GDO3) for the pilot experiment in the paper 
 Glossary.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), OligoHash (HTO), Guides (GDO) for the glossary experiment in the paper 
 Validation.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), OligoHash (HTO), Guides (GDO) for the validation experiment in the paper 
 Test.rds - A Seurat object, containing RNA, Protein (ADT), and OligoHash (HTO) to test modeling paradigms on 
 GWPS_mTOR.rds A Seurat object derived from a subset of perturbations in  GWPS (Replogle, et al, 2022) with stored pRPS6 model values 
 Modeling_scripts.R - an R script that contains to code to produce the models from the Glossary.rds object and apply it to different datasets
steps_raw:
Pilot.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), OligoHash (HTO), Guides (GDO), and Gene-level guides (GDO3) for the pilot experiment in the paper 
 Glossary.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), OligoHash (HTO), Guides (GDO) for the glossary experiment in the paper 
 Validation.rds - A Seurat object containing RNA, Protein (ADT), OligoHash (HTO), Guides (GDO) for the validation experiment in the paper 
 Test.rds - A Seurat object, containing RNA, Protein (ADT), and OligoHash (HTO) to test modeling paradigms on 
 GWPS_mTOR.rds A Seurat object derived from a subset of perturbations in  GWPS (Replogle, et al, 2022) with stored pRPS6 model values 
 Modeling_scripts.R - an R script that contains to code to produce the models from the Glossary.rds object and apply it to different datasets
